metadata.description: Used cars, accident vehicles, vehicle parts & tire change

sectionAboutUs.title: About Us
sectionAboutUs.description: What started as a small passion for engines has grown over the years into a versatile family business. We believe that every vehicle has value – whether it shines in the showroom or needs a second chance after an accident.

usedCars.title:
Used Cars:
Buying & Selling
usedCars.description: We buy and sell used cars of all kinds. Whether you're looking for an economical city car, a reliable estate for the family, or a robust vehicle for commercial use – we offer a diverse selection. Want to sell your vehicle? We'll make you a fair offer – quick and hassle-free.

accidentCars.title:
Accident Cars:
Buying & Selling
accidentCars.description: We buy and sell accident and defect vehicles. Have a damaged car? We'll take it off your hands at a fair price. At the same time, we offer accident and defect vehicles for sale – ideal for spare parts recovery, hobbyists, or export. An honest assessment of the condition is guaranteed.

vehicleParts.title:
Vehicle
Parts
vehicleParts.description: Whether it's engines, transmissions, body parts, or electronics – we offer a wide range of used vehicle parts at fair prices. Thanks to our constant vehicle purchasing, we continuously have new parts in stock. Just ask – we often have exactly the right spare part for your vehicle.

tireService.title:
Tire
Change
tireService.description: Whether it's a seasonal switch from summer to winter tires or the other way around – we handle the complete tire change for you. We also mount new tires and professionally balance them. Fast, reliable, and at fair prices. Simply book an appointment and drive off with the right set of tires.
